description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the external configuration from https://gitlab.wpdesk.dev/wpdesk/gitlab-ci/raw/master/gitlab-ci-1.2.yml and defines a variable IS_LIBRARY set to 1. The pipeline should inherit all stages, jobs, images, services, caches, artifacts, and rules defined in the included file, while the IS_LIBRARY variable is available to all jobs for conditional logic. Ensure the include directive is placed at the top level and the variable is declared under the global variables section.
